{{Infobox concept
| name = Archmage
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Archmage Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|An Archmage is a highly skilled and certified practitioner of magic within the galaxy, often recognized by organizations such as the [[Galactic Union]]. These individuals are defined by their relationship with the [[Aether]], which reflects their identity through a single pinnacle spell and the specific way they choose to utilize their magic. While many [[Archmagi]] specialize in particular disciplines—such as water elementalism, predictive divination, or the sealing and [[binding]] of energy—some possess much broader capabilities. Some individuals have even achieved unprecedented status, such as a sixfold or sevenfold Archmage, possessing multiple sets of magic that would typically be impossible under the constraints of the [[Aether]]. In terms of power and influence, certain [[Archmagi]] are categorized as fleet-class threats. They often serve in significant leadership or advisory roles, acting as captains of vessels, members of royal guards, or high-ranking officers within mage corps. The profession is traditionally associated with specific tools and appearances, including the use of staves—which share a profound and nearly unbreakable bond with their owners—and flowing robes. Furthermore, the [[essence]] of an Archmage can persist after death, manifesting as spirits or ghosts that can interact with the living and provide counsel.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The rank of Archmage is a [[Union]]-certified level of wizardry earned through significant magical feats and specialized knowledge. [[Varic Vallenar]] holds this title, appearing as a dark-skinned human man with silver eyes who carries a wand and wears a blue hooded mantle. As a certified expert in [[binding]] and sealing magic, he possesses the ability to bend the rules of magic and understand the sharing of [[Aetheric patterns]]. During operations, such as those involving a [[Union strike team]], an Archmage utilizes large-scale magic and maintains a profound bond with his staff.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An [[Archmage]] is a level of wizardry.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An [[Archmage]] is a human woman who uses large-scale magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c12">''The Captain'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Union strike team]] contained at least one [[Archmage]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An [[Archmage]] can understand the sharing of [[Aetheric patterns]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Archmage]] is a dark-skinned human man with silver eyes who wears a blue hooded mantle and carries a wand.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c17">''The Captain'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Archmage]] is a certified [[Archmage]] of [[binding]] and sealing magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Archmages are [[Union]]-certified.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An [[Archmage]] is a level of magic user that can be granted via certification and knowledge.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An [[Archmage]] has the ability to bend the rules of magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An [[Archmage]] is a title earned through significant magical feats.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c31">''The Captain'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] holds the rank of [[Archmage]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c37">''The Captain'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An [[Archmage]] has a profound bond with his staff.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Shyrax possesses a ring containing the ghost of a human [[Archmage]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3">''The Engineer'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|An [[Archmage]] can perform miracles when prepared and knowing what is coming.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Archmage]] is a legendary necromancer.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c3">''The Knight'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Archmage]] is a thousand-year-old death mage.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|An [[Archmage]] is a scholar who explores the [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Let’s say I had found a way to grant you my power. From this moment on, you’re a full Archmage.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
